quick_skim.title: Frequency-Domain Neural ODEs for Modeling Non-Linear Dynamical Systems
quick_skim.abstract: Standard continuous-depth models, such as Neural Ordinary Differential Equations (NODEs), offer significant advantages in modeling physical systems by learning continuous vector fields rather than discrete temporal steps. However, when applied to complex dynamical systems, standard NODEs frequently struggle with highly nonlinear dynamics. This paper investigates the Frequency-domain Neural ODE (FNODE), an architecture that projects continuous temporal dynamics into the frequency domain using the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT). By operating in the frequency domain, the model provides better generalization to the dynamical system. The architecture is empirically evaluated against discrete models, specifically Gated Recurrent Units (GRUs) and Long Short-Term Memory (LSTMs), and other continuous-depth variants, including Augmented Neural ODE (ANODE), across four distinct dynamical systems: the Lotka-Volterra model, the forced Duffing oscillator, the Van der Pol oscillator, and the Lorenz system. To rigorously assess generalization and robustness, curriculum and ensemble learning are used to evaluate the model's convergence by estimating confidence intervals across different ensemble models. The empirical results demonstrate that the FNODE architecture achieves better generalization while exhibiting remarkable convergence stability.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Frequency-domain Neural ODEs for modeling nonlinear dynamical systems, potentially aiding Lyapunov function discovery
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 频域神经ODE用于非线性动力系统建模，可辅助李雅普诺夫函数发现
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 频域神经ODE用于非线性动力系统建模，可辅助李雅普诺夫函数发现
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 频域神经ODE用于非线性动力系统建模，可辅助李雅普诺夫函数发现
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Frequency-domain Neural ODEs that project dynamics into frequency domain via FFT, improving generalization for complex systems; could serve as a data-driven model for Lyapunov function discovery.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出频域神经ODE（FNODE），通过快速傅里叶变换将连续时间动力学投影到频域，有效改善了非线性动力系统建模的泛化能力。在多个基准上，FNODE优于传统神经ODE和离散模型（如GRU、LSTM）。该架构可作为数据驱动方法，为后续的李雅普诺夫函数发现提供精确的系统辨识模型。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出频域神经ODE（FNODE），通过快速傅里叶变换将连续时间动力学投影到频域，有效改善了非线性动力系统建模的泛化能力。在多个基准上，FNODE优于传统神经ODE和离散模型（如GRU、LSTM）。该架构可作为数据驱动方法，为后续的李雅普诺夫函数发现提供精确的系统辨识模型。

quick_skim.title: Learning the Koopman Operator using Attention Free Transformers
quick_skim.abstract: Learning Koopman operators with autoencoders enables linear prediction in a latent space, but long-horizon rollouts often drift off the learned manifold, leading to phase and amplitude errors on systems with switching, continuous spectra, or strong transients. We introduce two complementary components that make Koopman predictors more robust. First, we add an attention-free latent memory (AFT) block that aggregates a short window of past latents to produce a corrected latent before each Koopman update. Unlike multi-head attention, AFT operates in linear time and adds only $\approx$30k parameters ($3d^2 + T^2$, fewer than matched multi-head attention), yet captures the local temporal context needed to suppress error divergence. Second, we propose dynamic re-encoding: lightweight, online change-point triggers (EWMA, CUSUM, and sequential two-sample tests) that detect latent drift and project predictions back onto the autoencoder manifold. Across three benchmark systems -- Duffing oscillator, Repressilator, IRMA -- our model consistently reduces error accumulation compared to a Koopman autoencoder and matched-capacity multi-head attention. We also compare against GRU and Transformer autoencoders, evaluated both from initial conditions and with a 50-step context, and find that Koopman+AFT (with optional re-encoding) attains markedly lower long-horizon error while maintaining lower inference latency. We report improvements over horizons up to 1000 steps, together with ablations over trigger policies. The result is a fast, compact predictor that stays on the learned manifold over long horizons.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Koopman operator learning with attention-free transformer for dynamical systems
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于无注意力变换器的柯普曼算子学习用于动力系统
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于无注意力变换器的柯普曼算子学习用于动力系统
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于无注意力变换器的柯普曼算子学习用于动力系统
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Attention-free latent memory and dynamic re-embedding improve long-horizon Koopman prediction for dynamical systems with switching and transients.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对柯普曼算子预测器在长时间预测中漂移的问题，提出无注意力潜在记忆块和动态重嵌入组件。前者以线性时间复杂度聚合过去潜在状态抑制误差发散，后者动态修正预测轨迹。在多个动力系统基准上，该方法显著提高了长期预测精度，为数据驱动动力学建模提供了稳健的变换器替代方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对柯普曼算子预测器在长时间预测中漂移的问题，提出无注意力潜在记忆块和动态重嵌入组件。前者以线性时间复杂度聚合过去潜在状态抑制误差发散，后者动态修正预测轨迹。在多个动力系统基准上，该方法显著提高了长期预测精度，为数据驱动动力学建模提供了稳健的变换器替代方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找动力系统的李雅普诺夫函数发现的相关论文，采用传统方法和transformer等ai算法都可以, especially work that connects or combines: discovering Lyapunov functions for dynamical systems; neural network based Lyapunov function; transformer model for Lyapunov function discovery; stability analysis of dynamical systems using Lyapunov functions; Lyapunov neural network methods; data-driven discovery of Lyapunov functions; recent advances in Lyapunov function discovery using deep learning; traditional methods for Lyapunov function construction; comparison of classical and AI methods for Lyapunov functions.
